title: builder: refactor the Scaffolder CLI to the code standard (behavior-preserving)
description: builder refactors the Scaffolder CLI in place to the extended code standard: deterministic layout (header -> imports -> constants -> helpers -> public surface), descriptive names, doc comments, pointer-block content separated from the wiring logic. Behavior-preserving — init stamp/pointer behavior and the stamp/pointer/preflight contracts unchanged. Gates: code-standards + package-qa both PASS.
acceptance_criteria: the Scaffolder CLI conforms to CODE_STANDARDS.md (code-standards PASS)
behavior unchanged — package-qa PASS (contracts intact, stamp manifest unchanged)
no new module tree, build step, or test suite
notes: Acceptance criterion 'src->root mirrored per Src-First' recorded N/A at ship: cli.js + pointer-block.js are package source (src/bin only), not stamped template files, so there is no root mirror.
